question: Rendering approach?
choice: Tile-based software renderer initially, WebGPU later
why: A tile renderer is: (1) trivially parallelizable, (2) cache-friendly, (3) works in WASM without WebGPU, (4) the rendering correctness can be verified by comparing tile output to expected values — it is deterministic. GPU rendering adds complexity and non-determinism. Start software, add GPU as optimization layer.
